title: Lost & Found Portal — TIET
description: UCS310 DBMS Project Database — Bhavin Bhatti, Bhoomi Mittal, Aatish Sahu

lost_found.title: Lost & Found Database
lost_found.description: All tables for the Lost and Found Portal including Users, Items, Categories and Claims.

FOUND_ITEM.title: Found Items
FOUND_ITEM.description: Items that have been turned in

CLAIM.title: Claims
CLAIM.description: Links between lost and found items

pending_claims.title: Pending Claims
pending_claims.sql: SELECT c.Claim_ID, l.Item_Name as Lost_Item, f.Item_Name as Found_Item, c.Status, c.Claimed_On FROM CLAIM c JOIN LOST_ITEM l ON c.Lost_ID=l.Lost_ID JOIN FOUND_ITEM f ON c.Found_ID=f.Found_ID WHERE c.Status='Pending'

items_by_category.title: Items per Category
items_by_category.sql: SELECT cat.Category_Name, COUNT(DISTINCT l.Lost_ID) as Lost, COUNT(DISTINCT f.Found_ID) as Found FROM CATEGORY cat LEFT JOIN LOST_ITEM l ON l.Category_ID=cat.Category_ID LEFT JOIN FOUND_ITEM f ON f.Category_ID=cat.Category_ID GROUP BY cat.Category_ID ORDER BY Lost DESC

returned_items.title: Returned Items
returned_items.sql: SELECT l.Item_Name as Lost_Item, f.Item_Name as Found_Item, ul.Name as Owner, c.Claimed_On FROM CLAIM c JOIN LOST_ITEM l ON c.Lost_ID=l.Lost_ID JOIN FOUND_ITEM f ON c.Found_ID=f.Found_ID JOIN USER ul ON l.User_ID=ul.User_ID WHERE c.Status='Approved'
